use_when: The Lab must detect regimes or anomalies in biosignals while separating physiology from artifact.
The value is a monitored hypothesis or triage constraint, not diagnosis.
do_not_use_when: The request asks for medical diagnosis, treatment advice or emergency decisions.
Subject consent, provenance or signal quality cannot be established.

starter_observables.name: heart_rate_variability
starter_observables.risk: Sensitive to sampling, device and preprocessing.

starter_observables.name: signal_quality_index
starter_observables.role: Separates data state from physiology claim.
starter_observables.risk: Quality proxy can hide systematic device bias.

starter_observables.name: circadian_phase
starter_observables.risk: Can be inferred poorly without sleep or context data.

starter_observables.name: artifact_rate
starter_observables.role: Movement, missing data and sensor noise.
starter_observables.risk: High artifact can resemble event clusters.

starter_falsifiers.blocks: Calling sensor noise a biological event.
Projecting one subject or cohort onto another.
Turning a monitoring signal into diagnosis.

admin_boundaries.boundary: Run on de-identified, consented or synthetic/open data.
The Lab may surface constraints, not medical advice.

e2e_checks.expectation: A completed cycle shows signal quality before any biological interpretation.

adaptation_questions: What data provenance and consent boundary applies?
Which artifact null must fail before interpretation?
